metadata.significance: Describes the Night of Power when the Quran was first revealed

ayahs.arabic: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.
translations.en_yusufali: We have indeed revealed this (Message) in the Night of Power:
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menurunkan (Al-Quran) ini pada Malam Lailatul-Qadar,

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee what the night of power is?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui apa dia kebesaran Malam Lailatul-Qadar itu?

ayahs.arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahrin

translations.en_sahih: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
translations.en_yusufali: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.
translations.ms_basmeih: Malam Lailatul-Qadar lebih baik daripada seribu bulan.

ayahs.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Tanazzalu almalaikatu waalrroohu feeha biithni rabbihim min kulli amrin

translations.en_sahih: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
translations.en_yusufali: Therein come down the angels and the Spirit by Allah's permission, on every errand:
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada Malam itu, turun malaikat dan Jibril dengan izin Tuhan mereka, kerana membawa segala perkara (yang ditakdirkan berlakunya pada tahun yang berikut);

translations.en_sahih: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
translations.en_yusufali: Peace!... This until the rise of morn!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sejahteralah Malam (yang berkat) itu hingga terbit fajar!
